message:
fix: resolve 4 rustdoc broken intra-doc link warnings

Replace bracketed references to non-existent doc targets with
backtick-only formatting in auth.rs, conformance.rs, extensions.rs,
and permissions.rs. `cargo doc --lib --no-deps` now produces zero
warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
